sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29481" key="dusrohtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσ-ροητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n29481.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leading to ill luck</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0074.tlg-02:4:1:58" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.1.58</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
